name: @tetherto/mdk-full-site-example
description: MDK full-site example — 3 miner families + 2 containers + 3 powermeters + 2 sensors + 2 pools over the RPC listener

scripts.setup: npm --prefix ../.. run setup && npm --prefix ../.. run build:ui && npm install && npm --prefix ui install
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
